---
title: " "
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section class="page-header">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <h1 class="page-title">Talks & Presentations</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle">Slides from conferences, seminars, and workshops.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="talks-full-section">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="talks-full-grid">

      <a class="talk-card-full" href="slides.html" target="_blank">
        <div class="talk-card-left">
          <span class="talk-year">2025</span>
        </div>
        <div class="talk-card-right">
          <p class="talk-event">ISI World Statistics Congress</p>
          <p class="talk-full-title">Combining Efforts: Integrating Citizen Science and Survey Data using <code>inlabru</code></p>
          <p class="talk-desc">Presentation on integrated species distribution models combining citizen science presence-only records with structured survey data via the INLA/inlabru framework.</p>
          <span class="talk-cta">View slides →</span>
        </div>
      </a>

      <!-- =====================================================
           ADD NEW TALKS BELOW — copy and paste the block above
           and update: href, year, event, title, desc
           ===================================================== -->

    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
